title: Pixel Art Studio
description: Full-featured pixel art editor: 7 tools, animation frames, symmetry mirroring, undo/redo, and PNG export.
concept: A browser-based pixel art editor with professional-grade tools. Draw with pencil, line, rectangle, ellipse, or fill. Apply horizontal, vertical, or quad symmetry mirroring. Animate across 8 frames with variable FPS playback. Every session auto-saves to localStorage; export crisp PNG with one click.
features: 7 drawing tools: pencil, eraser, fill bucket, line, rectangle, ellipse, eyedropper
4 symmetry modes: none, horizontal, vertical, both-axis

interaction.mouse: Left-click draws with primary color; right-click draws with secondary color
interaction.click: Select tools and palette colors; right-click palette swatch to set secondary
interaction.touch: Touch to draw on mobile; responsive layout with horizontal tool strip
interaction.keyboard: P/E/F/L/R/O/I for tools · X to swap colors · Space to play · [ ] for frames · Ctrl+Z/Y undo/redo · Ctrl+S export
